flashcards.example: Excuse me, where is the bus stop?
Take care on your way home
Have a nice day at work
Their son is five years old
His wife works at a bank
My relatives visit us on Tet
I have an egg for breakfast
She chooses a pale pink shirt
We study seven days a week
The bus arrives in fifteen minutes
The shop opens on the eighteenth day
The park is quiet in the evening
The new year starts in January
The clock is on the wall
It is foggy in the morning
I want to buy a shirt
My mom goes to the market
Put the apples in the basket
Can I try on this jacket?
I take the bus to school
He goes to work by motorbike
The station is near my house
I ride my bike every day
How do you go to school?
The cafe is on the corner
The school is near the park
My house is far from here
The bank is next to the post office
The hospital is opposite the mall
The library is between two shops
The car is behind the house
He waits in front of the gate
The bridge is over the river
The bus stop is near my school
My phone is on the table
I send a message to my friend
I need to charge my phone
We have a video call at night
Leave a voicemail after the beep
Hold on, I will get him
She is busy, so call later
